name: Median Calculator
desc: Median Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Calculate median of a data set.
seo_description: Use our free median calculator to quickly estimate mediana, cantidad based on v1, v2, v3. No registration needed.
result_context: The median es The value central when The data están ordenados. Resistente a values extremos.
formula_display: Mediana = value central (n impar) or average of dos centrales (n par)
steps: Ordenar The values of lesser a greater
Identify si hay quantity par or impar of values
Select The value central or promediar The dos centrales
